content: Let me check the Bio module location and find the BasicChromosome source:

function.name: run_custom_test
function.arguments:
{"code": "import Bio.Graphics.BasicChromosome as BC
import inspect

# Get the source of Chromosome._draw_label
print("Source of Chromosome._draw_label:")
print(inspect.getsource(BC.Chromosome._draw_label))", "test_snippet": "print("Test")", "timeout_seconds": 10}
